General.Name: IRC Ltd
General.Description: IRC Limited operates as an investment holding company that develops, produces, and sells industrial commodities products in the Russia, People's Republic of China, and internationally. The company operates through Mines in Production, Mines in Development, Engineering, and Other segments. The Mines in Production segment comprises iron ore projects in production phase, which include the K&S Project located in the Obluchenskoye district of the Jewish Autonomous Region in the Russian Far East. The Mines in Development segment consists of iron ore projects in the exploration and development phase comprising the Garinskoye project that focuses on iron ore deposits in the Amur region; Kostenginskoye project; and the Bolshoi Seym project that explores for ilmenomagnetite, magnetite, and ilmenite located in the located in the Tynda district of Amur region in the Russian Far East region. The Engineering segment provides in-house engineering services. The Other segment engages in the production of vanadium pentoxides and related products, and other projects. It is also involved in the provision of general trading, transportation, and engineering services. IRC Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
